about.name: SHAKUR
about.bio: I craft clean, purposeful digital experiences. Passionate about turning complex problems into elegant interfaces. Currently open to new opportunities.

projects.title: Orbit — Task Manager
projects.description: A drag-and-drop task manager with real-time sync, built with React DnD and Supabase.
projects.overview: Orbit is a modern task management application that lets teams collaborate in real-time. Built with a focus on smooth drag-and-drop interactions and instant data synchronization across all connected clients.
howItWorks: User creates a board and invites team members via email link
Tasks are created as cards and organized into customizable columns
Drag-and-drop powered by React DnD moves cards between columns with live sync
Supabase Realtime broadcasts changes instantly to all connected users
Notifications are sent via webhook when tasks are assigned or completed
features: Task priority levels and due date tracking
projects.challenges: The trickiest part was reconciling optimistic UI updates with real-time sync conflicts when multiple users moved the same card simultaneously. Solved using a timestamp-based conflict resolution strategy.
projects.learnings: Deepened my understanding of real-time architecture, optimistic UI patterns, and how to design database schemas that support collaborative workflows without race conditions.

projects.title: Lumina — E-Commerce
projects.description: Minimalist storefront with Stripe checkout, product filtering, and an admin dashboard.
projects.overview: Lumina is a full-featured e-commerce platform built for a boutique fashion brand. It features a clean, minimal storefront with advanced product filtering, a secure Stripe checkout flow, and a comprehensive admin dashboard for inventory management.
howItWorks: Products are stored in PostgreSQL and served via Next.js API routes with ISR caching
Advanced filtering uses URL query params so results are shareable and SEO-friendly
Cart state is persisted in localStorage with a Zustand store for cross-tab sync
Stripe Checkout handles payment with webhook confirmation before order creation
Admin dashboard provides real-time inventory updates and order management
features: ISR-powered product pages for fast load times
Stripe payment with webhook order confirmation
projects.challenges: Handling Stripe webhook reliability in production required implementing idempotency keys and a retry queue to ensure no orders were missed during payment confirmation.
projects.learnings: Gained deep experience with payment systems, ISR caching strategies, and how to architect e-commerce data models that scale cleanly from MVP to production.

projects.title: Pulse — Analytics
projects.description: Real-time web analytics dashboard with custom chart components and CSV export.
projects.overview: Pulse is a lightweight analytics dashboard that gives website owners a privacy-first alternative to Google Analytics. It tracks page views, sessions, and custom events without cookies, displaying everything in a clean real-time dashboard.
howItWorks: A tiny (< 2kb) script is embedded on the tracked website to capture events
Events are sent to an Express API endpoint and stored in a time-series PostgreSQL table
Dashboard polls the API every 30 seconds and updates charts without full page reload
Chart.js renders custom-styled line, bar, and doughnut charts with animated transitions
CSV export queries aggregate data and streams it directly to the browser as a download
features: Real-time visitor count and session data
One-click CSV export for any date range
projects.challenges: Building a tracking script under 2kb while still capturing enough meaningful data required aggressive tree-shaking and creative use of the Beacon API for non-blocking event delivery.
projects.learnings: Learned a huge amount about browser APIs, time-series data modelling, and how to build performant dashboards that feel fast even when rendering large datasets.
